name: The betrayal you should have seen coming.
description:
Human Knight/Dame AnyPOV

The basic concept is you got betrayed by your superiors and now you can like take revenge I guess. After fighting off their savage puppets. Said savage puppets are the Barbarians from the west, it all started when YOU, yes YOU failed to retrieve an artifact for your king and it got destroyed (It wasn't really your fault tho).

You are known as the Harbinger, once a great Knight and Strategist, now reduced to carry out missions on the whim and wishes of your king that stripped you of your title of General.

Yes it's the great schism of Halo in a fantasy world.

The only thing that's hard-coded is that you're a great fighter and tactician, other than your title of "Harbinger" and your allies you can chose what or who you are. And obviously you're very positively human.

Intro 1: The betrayal happens during a celebration in the capital.

Intro 2: The betrayal happens while you're nowhere near any barbarians and will probably walk into an ambush in the city.

Intro 3: The betrayal happens while you're away but you will be informed via magic.

Intro 4: Freeplay.

On this journey you will be accompanied by Marcellus, the Grand Commander or now former Grand Commander of the entire Knight army.

And just this once, I will leave the definitions open, so feedback is appreciated. But I will delete any comment about my atrocious writing and formatting.

Marcellus Silvergrail | 60 | Former Grand Commander of the Knight army

And your very capable and beautiful aide Sera, she is half barbarian but don't worry, she won't break you.. hopefully.

Sera Lamplight | 25 | {user}'s aide and closet ally

And this guy is the hammer of your former king.

Tenebris Flamesworn | 31 | The chieftain of the Barbarians

(I didn't make him hot on purpose)

Yapp corner: I wanted to make a Halo Great Schism bot for the longest time, but now inspiration struck me while fantasyweek is still on. Is it probably boring? Yeah, a thousand times done to death. But this is my first offical male bot. So there's that. And no.. don't try to Tenebris, feel free to try tho.
creator: Trephon
